resources.string: "Augustus Live Wallpaper needs the original Caesar 3 files. Copy your Caesar 3 folder to this device, then tap the button below to select it. The files are copied into the app\'s private storage so the wallpaper can read them.\n\nAfter the copy finishes, set Augustus as your live wallpaper from your launcher\'s wallpaper picker."
Caesar 3 files installed. Ready to use as a live wallpaper.
